name: Mitsuba Corporation
summary: Mitsuba Corporation manufactures and sells automotive electronic components. The company operates through Transportation Equipment-Related Operations, Information Service Operations, and Others segments. It provides auto electrical products, including front and rear wiper systems, windshield washer systems, door mirrors, lamps, power window and seat motors, roof motors, power sliding door drive systems, door lock actuators, fuel tank lid openers, power relays, horns, starter motors, cooling fans and motors, intelligent dynamic actuators, electric oil pumps, electronic throttle control motors, and electric power steering and servo brake motors. The company also offers motorcycle electrical products, such as starter motors, AC generators, ACG starters, fuel pump modules, starter relays, flasher relays, general use relays, actuators, horns, LED turn signal and license lamps; and EV Ecorun motors and solar car products. In addition, it provides general use products comprising general-purpose motors and bicycle power generation systems; and nursing care products, such as driving actuators and driving actuator controllers. Further, the company is involved in the information and agency services businesses. It primarily operates in Japan, China, other Asian countries, the Americas, and Europe. The company was formerly known as Mitsuba Electric Mfg. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Mitsuba Corporation in October 1996. Mitsuba Corporation was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Kiryu, Japan.
